ext_input_signal_and_other_controls: External Input Signal and Other Controls
note_input_power_not_shown_to_public: Note that input power at alternative load points is not shown to the public.
label_ci_annual_savings: Estimated annual savings are based on the 30 hp motor, 4000 run hours, and 15¢ per kWh, when compared to the least efficient pump allowed on the market. Actual savings may vary. Visit the Pump Savings Calculator at www.pumps.org/pscalculator.
label_circ_annual_savings: Estimated annual savings are based on the most efficient rating available, 2500 annual run hours, and 15¢ per kWh, when compared to the least efficient pump available in the market. Actual savings may vary. Visit the Circulator Pump Savings Calculator at www.pumps.org/cpsc.
label_er_methods: The Energy Rating is dependent on the selected control method. Method(s) available for this model are:
label_meets_doe_reg: Meets the 2028 DOE circulator efficiency regulation
